content.title: Archive Before Dawn
content.logline: Rowan tries to hide the evidence before Mira can reach it.
content.opening_hook: Rowan slips into the archive before dawn.
content.main_conflict: Mira must expose Rowan before the archive evidence disappears.
content.emotional_payoff: Mira realizes Rowan is afraid of the truth.
content.cliffhanger: A torn label reveals another storage room.

beats.summary: Rowan tries to hide the evidence before Mira can reach it.

elements.text: Rowan slides the letter behind an archive drawer before dawn.
The archive will be empty before she arrives.
